codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature record, handoff, transcript skeleton, commit cb1a7aa5508bf63f15862ddabc0e63baec095a7e, and current branch state for the provider-registry refactor. The change is a behavior-preserving extraction: the original state/provider-registry.ts logic was split into focused ai/providers helpers (instance-id, instance-normalize, instance-registry, instance-migrate, instance-models), while state/provider-registry.ts and state/provider-models.ts now act as backward-compatible re-export shims. The extracted helpers preserve the pre-refactor normalization, registry lookup, migration, and model-merging logic, and I did not find an in-scope correctness regression or scope violation in the reviewed commit.

summary: Pass. Commit cb1a7aa5508bf63f15862ddabc0e63baec095a7e cleanly moves provider-registry responsibilities into smaller ai/providers modules while keeping the existing state-layer entry points as compatibility re-exports. The extracted code matches the prior logic for provider normalization, registry access, profile migration, and model merging, so no blocking issue was found in scope.
